# WINDROUTER — Sailing route optimizer with real-time wind physics.

*Auto-generated by APSA-Net Teacher Agent — 2026-06-15 13:57*

## Overview

WINDROUTER — Sailing route optimizer with real-time wind physics.
Computes optimal sailing routes between coordinates using live wind data.

Usage:
  windrouter route 37.8,-122.4 37.4,-122.2    Route between two points
  windrouter wind 37.8,-122.4                  Current wind at location
  windrou

```bash
python main.py --help

## Functions

| Signature | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `interpolate_polar(wind_kts: float, angle: float)` | Get boat speed for given wind speed and apparent wind angle. |
| `fetch_wind(lat: float, lon: float, hours: int)` | Fetch wind forecast from Open-Meteo (free, no API key). |
| `bearing(lat1: float, lon1: float, lat2: float)` | Initial bearing from point 1 to point 2 (degrees). |
| `distance_nm(lat1: float, lon1: float, lat2: float)` | Haversine distance in nautical miles. |
| `apparent_wind_angle(true_wind_dir: float, boat_heading: float)` | Compute apparent wind angle (0=on the nose, 180=dead downwin |
| `boat_speed_kts(true_wind_speed_kts: float, true_wind_dir: float, heading: float)` | Compute boat speed for given wind and heading. |
| `optimal_heading(true_wind_speed_kts: float, true_wind_dir: float, dest_bearing: float)` | Find optimal heading considering VMG (velocity made good) to |
| `cmd_route(args)` | Compute optimal sailing route between two points. |
| `cmd_wind(args)` | Show current wind at a location. |
| `deg_to_cardinal(deg: float)` | — |
| `cmd_simulate(args)` | Simulate sailing for N hours from a point. |
| `cmd_polar(args)` | Display polar speed diagram as ASCII art. |
